subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-02-08 in Abu Sinan
subcodes.first_line: Cleanliness has a profound effect upon the spirit. Even though cleanliness is related to worldly affairs, yet its effect is manifested in the soul.
subcodes.first_line_orig: کثبف طالب کثیف است پاکی تاثیر کلی در روح دارد و لو خود پاکیزگی عرض است
